applicability: CDR static-analysis and complexity gates should combine measurable structural metrics, security checks, test evidence, and risk-tier thresholds.

claims: Review should evaluate design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style, documentation, every line, and broader context.
sources.name: Google Engineering Practices - What to look for in a code review

claims: Secure coding checklists cover input validation, access control, error handling/logging, file management, memory management, and general coding practices.
sources.name: OWASP Secure Coding Practices Checklist

claims: Cyclomatic complexity measures paths through code; cognitive complexity qualifies how hard control flow is to understand; both can be used in quality gates.
sources.name: SonarQube metric definitions

claims: Secure software development should reduce vulnerabilities, mitigate exploit impact, and address root causes to prevent recurrence.
sources.name: NIST SSDF SP 800-218
